response.justification: A versatile, experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, embedded, and high-throughput services (notably millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic), plus relevant systems languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JS/TS) and a strong testing/craftsmanship culture. However, the resume shows no experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry/metrics, or statistical-analysis experience, which are the core of this Principal/IC6 Growth & Experimentation role. Career history is predominantly hands-on IC work rather than principal-scale, multi-team technical leadership, and Python is absent. A fit for a senior generalist role, but a stretch for this specialized mandate.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (15+ yrs) including low-latency, high-traffic distributed services
Solid coverage of required languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JS/TS) plus strong TDD/CI/CD discipline
Open-source platform ownership and public talks/workshops show initiative and communication
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flagging, or measurement-platform experience — the role's core
Limited telemetry/metrics and statistical/data-analysis depth; Python not listed
Mostly IC craftsman roles; little evidence of principal-level cross-team architectural leadership
